name: vif-codex-agent-pack
description: Codex-ready VIF factory station instructions, skills, hooks, and commands for issue-to-PR, PR review, and repair workflows.

interface.longDescription: VIF Codex Agent Pack provides controlled operating instructions, skills, hooks, and command runbooks for repeatable issue-to-PR execution, deterministic PR review, and scoped repair loops while preserving human merge authority.
